organized_notes.text: nice early rally on SPY but this is relatively strong pullback to below VWAP-
AAPL looking weak here, testing the 8 EMA rn
banks nice follow thru from yesterday's strength, RS today too
long JPM @ 346.32, 3 shares - strong today, above PDH, SPY may not provide much tailwind but this is a nice RS stock and not too extended from support at VWAP [TRADE: long JPM @ 346.32 x3]
partial exit JPM long @ 347.86, 1 share - trimming position here as JPM hits a H+ and could pullback [TRADE: exit JPM long @ 347.86 x1]
looks like SPY and JPM are going strong, but remember that SPY had a deep pullback earlier - unlikely for it to rally off without a pullback eventually
partial exit JPM long @ , 1 share - 3 long stacked greens, JPM is quite extended at this point - chances of pullback are high, take some risk off
I wanted to take JPM long at this level but held back as this market is hard to trust
